testCases.title: User can log in with valid credentials
testCases.description: Verify the happy-path login flow for an existing active user.
testCases.expectedResult: User is redirected to /dashboard and sees their profile name.

testCases.title: Login fails with invalid password
testCases.description: Negative case: wrong password should surface an inline error.
testCases.expectedResult: Inline error 'Invalid email or password' is shown; user stays on /login.

testCases.title: Create new building from Buildings page
testCases.description: Create a new building record and verify it appears in the list.
testCases.expectedResult: New building is visible in the Buildings list and opens in detail view.

testCases.title: ESPM import completes for a valid account
testCases.description: Ensure ENERGY STAR Portfolio Manager sync succeeds.
testCases.expectedResult: Import finishes with a success toast and imported buildings appear.
